discrepancy_investigation.context: iter_001 showed M1+M3 pilot Ortho=1.339 but full Ortho=0.301
discrepancy_investigation.hypothesis: HumanEval 0% pass@1 dragged down combined AccRet in iter_001
discrepancy_investigation.iter2_fix: Compute Ortho on GSM8K-only and 0.7*GSM8K+0.3*MATH500 separately, drop HumanEval from combined metric
discrepancy_investigation.finding: GSM8K quality preserved (AccRet>0.90) in at least one config. iter_001 discrepancy likely caused by HumanEval's 0% baseline destroying combined metric. With corrected combined metric (0.7*GSM8K+0.3*MATH500), M1+M3 shows interference.
